calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #12, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Wertsch for petitioner Hilary La Tondre.

The Court questioned the basis for the justification for the 1% fee. Mr. Wertsch stated that he could get a supplemental declaration from the second trustee further showing the basis for the fee request. The Court stated that he would like to see time records which justified the 1% request for fees. The Court added that the trustees could submit their future accountings on a two-year basis rather than annually. He stated that he would take the matter under submission pending the receipt of Ms. La Tondre's verification. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported).
